input: 已完成澄清，请生成一个 AI Hub 工作流：联网检索公开来源并校验原文；找不到可信作者、朝代、原文和来源链接时，流程不继续生成；最后生成带人声歌曲音频和 MV 视频的完整作品。
must_contain_all: 直接按原生节点方案生成
expected_behavior: A source-quality gate inside a generation request should be preserved as workflow behavior and move to final alignment, not be misread as a command to pause or as an invitation to ask engineering contingency questions.
